# Animation Vocabulary

Reverse-lookup glossary that turns a vague description of a web animation or motion effect into its exact term ("the bouncy thing when a popover opens" → Pop in; "the iOS rubber-band scro…

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add animation-vocabulary --to ./skills
```
